THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANJURA, LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DELORIO, DANIELLE $1,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,940.00, AFTER THE JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL, PLAINTIFF MAY CASH THE CHECK FROM DEFENDANT'S INSURER, TO BE CREDITED IN PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF THE JUDGMENT.
